name: Food Halls and Football Food Tour

location.name: King St W and Entertainment Districts

description:
Limited-time, high-energy, flavour-packed, this is Toronto's most delicious ticket of the summer.  For one electric month, Toronto becomes a stadium without walls. 

Showcasing the flavours of football's most passionate nations: Italy, Argentina, Mexico, Venezuela, Canada and USA.

Each stop is timed to the rhythm of the tournament. Matches flicker across giant screens. Scarves hang from shoulders. Strangers become instant friends over shared allegiances and second helpings. You won't just taste the food. You'll taste the pride behind it.

Enjoy tasty food including Artisan Sodas and Pretzels, Crispy Fish Tacos, Tequeños, Biscotti and Amaretti, Steak Sandwich with Chimichurri, Banana Pudding and more!
